posts.text: As AI firms bid up the price of land and energy, the dollars people earn will go less far. Eventually humans could, like horses in the age of the car, become uneconomical https://www.economist.com/leaders/2026/05/14/prepare-for-an-ai-jobs-apocalypse?taid=6a0d9d96b912840001008087&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text:
BREAKING: China banned Nvidia's, $NVDA, RTX 5090D V2 gaming chip while Jensen Huang was visiting China with President Trump last week, per FT.

Details include:

1. The chip was added to a list of banned goods at China’s customs checkpoints last Friday

2. The move comes as the Chinese government wants to support domestic chipmakers such as Huawei and Cambricon as they catch up to US rivals

3. The RTX 5090D V2 was introduced last August specifically to comply with US export controls

4. It was aimed at Chinese gamers and 3D animators but it has also been bought by AI developers

The AI arms race continues to ramp up.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
